body.prompt: Create a clean educational study-note illustration for school students. Subject: Chemistry. Grade level: Class XII / 12. Session: Solutions - Session 1. Concept: What Exactly is a Solution?. Visual requirement: A beaker showing clear liquid with no visible particles settling. Style: textbook-friendly, scientific, diagram-like, clear, accurate, uncluttered, centered composition, white or light background, student-safe. Important: do not draw any words, letters, labels, captions, heading text, numbering, or watermark inside the image. Show the concept visually only. Keep all explanation outside the image. Prefer clean shapes, arrows without text, color-coded parts, and simple educational composition.
body.negative_prompt: no words, no text, no letters, no typography, no labels, no captions, no title text, no handwritten text, no gibberish text, no watermark
